customContent.footer_message: We cannot wait to celebrate with you
customContent.gallery_sub_1: Where Timeless Tradition Meets Refined Elegance
customContent.gallery_desc_1: Experience the art of fine dining with meticulously arranged tablescapes, crystal glassware, and candlelit ambiance that transforms every meal into a cherished memory.
customContent.gallery_sub_2: Delicate Florals to Enchant Every Moment
customContent.gallery_desc_2: Hand-selected seasonal blooms arranged with artistic precision, each petal telling a story of love and new beginnings in the most beautiful way.
customContent.gallery_sub_3: Raise a Glass to Love and Laughter
customContent.gallery_desc_3: From vintage champagne towers to signature cocktails, we curate libations that sparkle as brightly as the joy shared between loved ones.
customContent.gallery_sub_4: The Perfect Backdrop for Your Special Day
customContent.gallery_desc_4: Breathtaking venues that capture the essence of romance, from historic chateaux to sun-drenched gardens, each location crafted for unforgettable moments.
customContent.gallery_sub_5: Crafted with Love, Savored with Joy
customContent.gallery_desc_5: Exquisite confections designed by master pastry artisans, blending timeless elegance with flavors that delight and centerpieces that captivate.
customContent.gallery_sub_6: Dancing Under a Canopy of Lights
customContent.gallery_desc_6: As twilight descends, magical illumination transforms the celebration into a dreamscape where every dance, every whisper becomes eternally memorable.

e[1].style==='french';});var italian=Object.entries(TP).filter(function(e){return e[1].style==='italian';});var american=Object.entries(TP).filter(function(e){return e[1].style==='american';});var cur='french-sage';var isOpen=false;function scopeSel(){var host=(root&&root.closest?root.closest('.mf-form-wrapper,[id^="mf-form-wrapper-"]'):null);var id=host&&host.id?('#'+host.id):(tp&&tp.formId?'#mf-form-wrapper-'+String(tp.formId):'');return id||'.mf-form-wrapper';}function applyTheme(key){var t=TP[key];if(!t)return;cur=key;var s=document.getElementById('cel-theme-vars');if(!s){s=document.createElement('style');s.id='cel-theme-vars';document.head.appendChild(s);}var sel=scopeSel();s.textContent=sel+'{--background:'+t.background+';--foreground:'+t.foreground+';--card:'+t.card+';--card-foreground:'+t.foreground+';--primary:'+t.primary+';--primary-foreground:'+t.primaryForeground+';--secondary:'+t.secondary+';--secondary-foreground:'+t.foreground+';--muted:'+t.muted+';--muted-foreground:'+t.mutedForeground+';--accent:'+t.accent+';--accent-foreground:'+t.foreground+';--border:'+t.border+';--input:'+t.muted+';--ring:'+t.primary+';--mfp-primary:'+t.primary+';--mfp-primary-dark:'+t.primary+';--mfp-accent:'+t.accent+';--mfp-bg:'+t.background+';--mfp-card-bg:'+t.card+';--mfp-text:'+t.foreground+';--mfp-text-muted:'+t.mutedForeground+';--mfp-border:'+t.border+';--mfp-border-focus:'+t.accent+';--mfp-section:'+t.mutedForeground+'}';var ps=document.getElementById('cel-ts-swatch');if(ps)ps.style.background=t.primary;var pn=document.getElementById('cel-ts-name');if(pn)pn.textContent=t.name;document.querySelectorAll('[data-theme-key]').forEach(function(btn){var isActive=btn.getAttribute('data-theme-key')===key;btn.style.background=isActive?'color-mix(in oklab,'+t.primary+' 10%,transparent)':'';var ck=btn.querySelector('.cel-check');if(ck)ck.style.display=isActive?'inline':'none';});if(tp&&typeof tp.setActiveThemeKey==='function'){try{tp.setActiveThemeKey(key,true);}catch(e){}}else{try{localStorage.setItem('cel-theme',key);}catch(e){}}}function mkBtn(key,theme){var btn=document.createElement('button');btn.type='button';btn.setAttribute('data-theme-key',key);btn.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;width:100%;padding:8px 12px;text-align:left;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;background:transparent;font-size:14px;transition:background .15s;';var sw=document.createElement('div');sw.style.cssText='display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;';[theme.primary,theme.secondary,theme.accent].forEach(function(c){var s=document.createElement('span');s.style.cssText='width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);background:'+c+';display:inline-block;';sw.appendChild(s);});var nm=document.createElement('span');nm.style.cssText='color:var(--foreground);flex:1;font-size:13px;';nm.textContent=theme.name;var ck=document.createElement('svg');ck.setAttribute('width','16');ck.setAttribute('height','16');ck.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 20 20');ck.setAttribute('fill','currentColor');ck.className='cel-check';ck.style.cssText='margin-left:auto;color:var(--primary);display:none;width:16px;height:16px;flex-shrink:0;';ck.innerHTML='<path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M16.707 5.293a1 1 0 010 1.414l-8 8a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 011.414-1.414L8 12.586l7.293-7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0z" clip-rule="evenodd"/>';btn.appendChild(sw);btn.appendChild(nm);btn.appendChild(ck);btn.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();applyTheme(key);close();});return btn;}function mkSection(title,themes,last){var sec=document.createElement('div');sec.style.cssText='padding:12px;'+(last?'':'border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);');var h=document.createElement('p');h.style.cssText='font-size:10px;font-weight:500;color:var(--muted-foreground);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 8px;font-family:inherit;';h.textContent=title;sec.appendChild(h);themes.forEach(function(e){sec.appendChild(mkBtn(e[0],e[1]));});return sec;}var wrap=document.createElement('div');wrap.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:99999;';var pill=document.createElement('button');pill.type='button';pill.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 14px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;color:var(--foreground);white-space:nowrap;';var ps=document.createElement('span');ps.id='cel-ts-swatch';ps.style.cssText='width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--primary);display:inline-block;';var pn=document.createElement('span');pn.id='cel-ts-name';pn.textContent='French Sage';var chv=document.createElement('svg');chv.setAttribute('width','16');chv.setAttribute('height','16');chv.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 24 24');chv.setAttribute('fill','none');chv.setAttribute('stroke','currentColor');chv.setAttribute('stroke-width','2');chv.style.cssText='transition:transform .2s;color:var(--muted-foreground);';chv.innerHTML='<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/>';pill.appendChild(ps);pill.appendChild(pn);pill.appendChild(chv);var panel=document.createElement('div');panel.style.cssText='position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;width:288px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.14);max-height:70vh;overflow-y:auto;display:none;z-index:9999;';panel.appendChild(mkSection('French Style',french,false));panel.appendChild(mkSection('Italian Style',italian,false));panel.appendChild(mkSection('American Style',american,true));wrap.appendChild(pill);wrap.appendChild(panel);if(!tp||tp.selectorEnabled!==false){document.body.appendChild(wrap);function positionWrap(){var nav=document.querySelector('header,.aperture-header,.aperture-nav,nav.dnn-nav');var navH=nav?nav.getBoundingClientRect().bottom:0;wrap.style.top=Math.max(16,navH+8)+'px';}positionWrap();window.addEventListener('resize',positionWrap);setTimeout(positionWrap,500);function open(){isOpen=true;panel.style.display='block';chv.style.transform='rotate(180deg)';}function close(){isOpen=false;panel.style.display='none';chv.style.transform='';}pill.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();isOpen?close():open();});document.addEventListener('click',function(){if(isOpen)close();});document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'&&isOpen)close();});}var saved=(tp&&typeof tp.getActiveThemeKey==='function'?tp.getActiveThemeKey():(tp&&tp.savedThemeKey)||null);if(saved==null){try{saved=localStorage.getItem('cel-theme');}catch(e){}}applyTheme(saved||((tp&&tp.defaultThemeKey)||'french-sage'));if(tp&&typeof tp.reportAvailable==='function'){try{tp.reportAvailable({activeThemeKey:cur,selectedThemeKey:cur,dirty:false});}catch(e){}}})(window.__mfCurrentScriptRoot||document,window.__mfScriptContext||{});

CustomContent.footer_message: We cannot wait to celebrate with you
CustomContent.gallery_sub_1: Where Timeless Tradition Meets Refined Elegance
CustomContent.gallery_desc_1: Experience the art of fine dining with meticulously arranged tablescapes, crystal glassware, and candlelit ambiance that transforms every meal into a cherished memory.
CustomContent.gallery_sub_2: Delicate Florals to Enchant Every Moment
CustomContent.gallery_desc_2: Hand-selected seasonal blooms arranged with artistic precision, each petal telling a story of love and new beginnings in the most beautiful way.
CustomContent.gallery_sub_3: Raise a Glass to Love and Laughter
CustomContent.gallery_desc_3: From vintage champagne towers to signature cocktails, we curate libations that sparkle as brightly as the joy shared between loved ones.
CustomContent.gallery_sub_4: The Perfect Backdrop for Your Special Day
CustomContent.gallery_desc_4: Breathtaking venues that capture the essence of romance, from historic chateaux to sun-drenched gardens, each location crafted for unforgettable moments.
CustomContent.gallery_sub_5: Crafted with Love, Savored with Joy
CustomContent.gallery_desc_5: Exquisite confections designed by master pastry artisans, blending timeless elegance with flavors that delight and centerpieces that captivate.
CustomContent.gallery_sub_6: Dancing Under a Canopy of Lights
CustomContent.gallery_desc_6: As twilight descends, magical illumination transforms the celebration into a dreamscape where every dance, every whisper becomes eternally memorable.

cur='french-sage';var isOpen=false;function scopeSel(){var host=(root&&root.closest?root.closest('.mf-form-wrapper,[id^="mf-form-wrapper-"]'):null);var id=host&&host.id?('#'+host.id):(tp&&tp.formId?'#mf-form-wrapper-'+String(tp.formId):'');return id||'.mf-form-wrapper';}function applyTheme(key){var t=TP[key];if(!t)return;cur=key;var s=document.getElementById('cel-theme-vars');if(!s){s=document.createElement('style');s.id='cel-theme-vars';document.head.appendChild(s);}var sel=scopeSel();s.textContent=sel+'{--background:'+t.background+';--foreground:'+t.foreground+';--card:'+t.card+';--card-foreground:'+t.foreground+';--primary:'+t.primary+';--primary-foreground:'+t.primaryForeground+';--secondary:'+t.secondary+';--secondary-foreground:'+t.foreground+';--muted:'+t.muted+';--muted-foreground:'+t.mutedForeground+';--accent:'+t.accent+';--accent-foreground:'+t.foreground+';--border:'+t.border+';--input:'+t.muted+';--ring:'+t.primary+';--mfp-primary:'+t.primary+';--mfp-primary-dark:'+t.primary+';--mfp-accent:'+t.accent+';--mfp-bg:'+t.background+';--mfp-card-bg:'+t.card+';--mfp-text:'+t.foreground+';--mfp-text-muted:'+t.mutedForeground+';--mfp-border:'+t.border+';--mfp-border-focus:'+t.accent+';--mfp-section:'+t.mutedForeground+'}';var ps=document.getElementById('cel-ts-swatch');if(ps)ps.style.background=t.primary;var pn=document.getElementById('cel-ts-name');if(pn)pn.textContent=t.name;document.querySelectorAll('[data-theme-key]').forEach(function(btn){var isActive=btn.getAttribute('data-theme-key')===key;btn.style.background=isActive?'color-mix(in oklab,'+t.primary+' 10%,transparent)':'';var ck=btn.querySelector('.cel-check');if(ck)ck.style.display=isActive?'inline':'none';});if(tp&&typeof tp.setActiveThemeKey==='function'){try{tp.setActiveThemeKey(key,true);}catch(e){}}else{try{localStorage.setItem('cel-theme',key);}catch(e){}}}function mkBtn(key,theme){var btn=document.createElement('button');btn.type='button';btn.setAttribute('data-theme-key',key);btn.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;width:100%;padding:8px 12px;text-align:left;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;background:transparent;font-size:14px;transition:background .15s;';var sw=document.createElement('div');sw.style.cssText='display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;';[theme.primary,theme.secondary,theme.accent].forEach(function(c){var s=document.createElement('span');s.style.cssText='width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);background:'+c+';display:inline-block;';sw.appendChild(s);});var nm=document.createElement('span');nm.style.cssText='color:var(--foreground);flex:1;font-size:13px;';nm.textContent=theme.name;var ck=document.createElement('svg');ck.setAttribute('width','16');ck.setAttribute('height','16');ck.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 20 20');ck.setAttribute('fill','currentColor');ck.className='cel-check';ck.style.cssText='margin-left:auto;color:var(--primary);display:none;width:16px;height:16px;flex-shrink:0;';ck.innerHTML='<path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M16.707 5.293a1 1 0 010 1.414l-8 8a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 011.414-1.414L8 12.586l7.293-7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0z" clip-rule="evenodd"/>';btn.appendChild(sw);btn.appendChild(nm);btn.appendChild(ck);btn.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();applyTheme(key);close();});return btn;}function mkSection(title,themes,last){var sec=document.createElement('div');sec.style.cssText='padding:12px;'+(last?'':'border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);');var h=document.createElement('p');h.style.cssText='font-size:10px;font-weight:500;color:var(--muted-foreground);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 8px;font-family:inherit;';h.textContent=title;sec.appendChild(h);themes.forEach(function(e){sec.appendChild(mkBtn(e[0],e[1]));});return sec;}var wrap=document.createElement('div');wrap.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:99999;';var pill=document.createElement('button');pill.type='button';pill.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 14px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;color:var(--foreground);white-space:nowrap;';var ps=document.createElement('span');ps.id='cel-ts-swatch';ps.style.cssText='width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--primary);display:inline-block;';var pn=document.createElement('span');pn.id='cel-ts-name';pn.textContent='French Sage';var chv=document.createElement('svg');chv.setAttribute('width','16');chv.setAttribute('height','16');chv.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 24 24');chv.setAttribute('fill','none');chv.setAttribute('stroke','currentColor');chv.setAttribute('stroke-width','2');chv.style.cssText='transition:transform .2s;color:var(--muted-foreground);';chv.innerHTML='<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/>';pill.appendChild(ps);pill.appendChild(pn);pill.appendChild(chv);var panel=document.createElement('div');panel.style.cssText='position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;width:288px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.14);max-height:70vh;overflow-y:auto;display:none;z-index:9999;';panel.appendChild(mkSection('French Style',french,false));panel.appendChild(mkSection('Italian Style',italian,false));panel.appendChild(mkSection('American Style',american,true));wrap.appendChild(pill);wrap.appendChild(panel);if(!tp||tp.selectorEnabled!==false){document.body.appendChild(wrap);function positionWrap(){var nav=document.querySelector('header,.aperture-header,.aperture-nav,nav.dnn-nav');var navH=nav?nav.getBoundingClientRect().bottom:0;wrap.style.top=Math.max(16,navH+8)+'px';}positionWrap();window.addEventListener('resize',positionWrap);setTimeout(positionWrap,500);function open(){isOpen=true;panel.style.display='block';chv.style.transform='rotate(180deg)';}function close(){isOpen=false;panel.style.display='none';chv.style.transform='';}pill.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();isOpen?close():open();});document.addEventListener('click',function(){if(isOpen)close();});document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'&&isOpen)close();});}var saved=(tp&&typeof tp.getActiveThemeKey==='function'?tp.getActiveThemeKey():(tp&&tp.savedThemeKey)||null);if(saved==null){try{saved=localStorage.getItem('cel-theme');}catch(e){}}applyTheme(saved||((tp&&tp.defaultThemeKey)||'french-sage'));if(tp&&typeof tp.reportAvailable==='function'){try{tp.reportAvailable({activeThemeKey:cur,selectedThemeKey:cur,dirty:false});}catch(e){}}})(window.__mfCurrentScriptRoot||document,window.__mfScriptContext||{});
